strengths: 15+ years of continuous hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum experience bar
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) shows genuine alignment with the role's AI focus
Founder of GISCollective and a history of public talks and workshops demonstrate entrepreneurial initiative and community influence
concerns: Current and historical seniority is Staff/Senior IC with no evidence of Director-level scope, org-wide technical strategy, or executive-level advisory work
AI expertise is very recent (2025) and narrow in scope — no demonstrated history of building recognized AI products or platforms at scale
No advanced degree in AI/ML and no background in ML engineering, model development, or cloud AI platform architecture; education stops at a CS bachelor's
response.justification: Bogdan has a credible 15-year engineering career with genuine polyglot breadth, recent hands-on AI tooling work, and entrepreneurial experience through GISCollective. However, the role is a Director-level individual contributor expected to advise enterprise customers, shape cloud and AI platform strategy, and carry recognized external authority in AI — a profile materially above Bogdan's current Staff/Senior positioning. His AI exposure is limited to a single recent role focused on developer tooling, and there is no evidence of large-scale AI product ownership, strategic customer advisory engagements, or the kind of industry recognition the job description signals. The gap between where he is and what the role demands is too wide to bridge with a single interview loop.
